base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of guile — a character (playable) from 1991 street fighter ii. Guile — Sonic Boom (charge-back+F P) + Flash Kick (charge-D+U K). Charge-character archetype. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
